economic_notes: Nogha Enterprises Ltd. (general contracting, aviation fuel sales, fire suppression); 507409 N.W.T. Ltd. (commercial real estate in Fort Simpson); Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.3% ownership, helicopter charter). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Liidlii Kue Society consolidated line-by-line (100% owned); Nogha Enterprises Ltd., 507409 N.W.T. Ltd., and Deh Cho Helicopters Regional LP accounted for by modified equity method. Long-term investments of $2,662,914 represent equity-method investments. Accounts receivable includes both trade receivables ($347,096) and contributions receivable ($521,432). Callable debt is a demand term loan held by Liidlii Kue Society. COVID-19 disclosed as subsequent event. Equity earnings from subsidiaries of $4,671 included in annual surplus. Administration expenses split across hosting ($55,069) and support ($487,734). Schedule 10 (management remuneration) not fully extracted from provided text.
